hero.title: Your entire marketing operation in one place
hero.subtitle: Video Engine, Content AI, CRM, Ads Manager and competitor Benchmark. Automate the full digital marketing loop without switching tools.

features.title: One platform, every module
features.subtitle: Every module is designed to replace a tool you already pay for.

video.title: Video Engine
video.description: AI-generated vertical and horizontal videos (script + voice + cuts + music) from a brief.

content.title: Content AI
content.description: Captions, posts and campaign ideas with Gemini. One click to turn them into video.

crm.title: CRM
crm.description: Visual pipeline, contacts, CSV import and integration with leads from your campaigns.

ads.title: Ads Manager
ads.description: Manage Meta, Google and TikTok campaigns from a single panel. Automation rules and cross-platform insights.

benchmark.title: Benchmark
benchmark.description: Track competitors and receive AI-generated reports of keywords, insights and opportunities.

api.title: Public API
api.description: Enterprise plans include a documented API to integrate Usina with BI, warehouses and internal systems.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, predictable growth
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your stage.

cta.title: Ready to replace 5 tools with one?
cta.subtitle: Create your free account and get going in under 5 minutes.

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.subtitle: Create keys to access the public API (Enterprise plan).
api_keys.raw_warning: Store this key somewhere safe. It will not be shown again.
api_keys.revoke_confirm: Revoke this key? Integrations using it will stop working.
